figures.caption: Figure 3: Comparison of CLPD and OPD on GSM8K.
Table 2: Performance (Mean ± Std, n=3) for different teacher–student configurations on the GSM8K and MATH datasets. Bold rows denote our CLPD method.

Figure 1: Overview of Curriculum Learning-Guided Progressive Distillation (CLPD) framework. CLPD combines an explicit curriculum over data—organizing training examples from easy (D1) to hard (D3)—with an implicit curriculum over supervision signals—progressively scheduling teachers from weak (T1) to strong (T3).
Table 3: Performance (Mean ± Std, n=3) for different teacher–student configurations on the StrategyQA and ARC-Challenge datasets. Bold rows denote our CLPD method.
